page_metadata.biotools__summary: A workflow and open-source software tool with a graphical user interface (GUI), that enables completely automated post-translational modification (PTM) identification and quantification exclusively from data-independent acquisition (DIA).
page_metadata.bioschemas__summary: A workflow and open-source software tool with a graphical user interface (GUI), that enables completely automated post-translational modification (PTM) identification and quantification exclusively from data-independent acquisition (DIA).
